allow: PowerShell($g = \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($g\){$g.Source}else{ foreach\($p in @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"\)\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){$p} } })

PowerShell($git = \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(-not $git\) { $candidates = @\("C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe","C:\\Program Files\\Git\\bin\\git.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"\); foreach \($c in $candidates\) { if \(Test-Path $c\) { $git = $c; break } } }; Write-Output "GIT=$git"; if \($git\) { & $git -C "C:\\MyLocal\\sikityakaimajan" log --oneline -20 })

PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if\(-not $py\){ $py=\(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source }; Write-Output "PY=$py"; if\($py\){ & $py -m py_compile "C:\\MyLocal\\sikityakaimajan\\friend_routes.py" "C:\\MyLocal\\sikityakaimajan\\main.py"; if\($?\){ Write-Output "PY_COMPILE_OK" } })

PowerShell($node = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "NODE=$node"; if\($node\){ foreach\($f in @\("app.js","friend.js"\)\){ & $node --check "C:\\MyLocal\\sikityakaimajan\\$f"; if\($?\){ Write-Output "$f OK" } } } else { Write-Output "node not available" })
